summary: The diff shows modifications to RideRequestForm.tsx that appear to implement all three requirements. The file summary confirms: pickup fields render only when locationMode === 'manual' (never depending on journeyType), drop fields are controlled by journeyType + returnToPickup, and GPS failures auto-switch locationMode to 'manual'. However, the diff content is truncated, so full verification of implementation details (especially the required attribute on drop fields and the exact GPS error handler code) is limited. Based on the file summary description, all three REQs appear to be addressed.
